title: Focuses Mind Over Matter
summary: You can telekinetically move objects with your mind without physically touching them.
tiers: Tier 3: Cloak of Opportunity or Enhance Strength
gm_intrusions: One mental slip, and moving objects drop or fragile objects break. Sometimes the wrong item moves, falls, or breaks.
text: You can telekinetically move objects with your mind without physically touching them.
details: You can telekinetically move objects with your mind without physically touching them.
